labels.value: You cannot add items to the cart which is of subscription.

Deals Discount already applied. Promo codes will not apply

labels.shortDescription: B2B Cart Delivery Groups Error Msg
labels.value: No Cart Delivery Groups have been defined
Billing address missing, please contact System Administrator.
User must have an Email to Checkout.
Something went wrong. Please, contact your System Administrator.
Error occurred during order creation, please contact System Administrator.
Please enter a valid purchase order number.
Error occurred during payment processing, please contact System Administrator.
To avoid delays in processing your order, please return to checkout and upload your purchase order.

labels.shortDescription: B2B Commerce Category Id Blank Error
B2B Commerce Category No Child Error
B2B Commerce Category Object Access Error
labels.value: Insufficient permissions to access B2B_Commerce_Category__c object.

labels.shortDescription: B2B Contact Admin No Meta Data
labels.value: No metadata records are available. Please contact your admin.
An error occurred while updating the currency. Please contact your admin.
Any cart items that were added prior to registration have been cleared due to locale change.
There are no Featured Categories in the store
Missing or invalid Country or Locale.
Changing your location may affect product availability and pricing.
Carts are also cleared in this process. Would you like to continue?
Please fill all the required fields

labels.value: No Buyer Group Member found for the Account.

labels.shortDescription: B2B csvToCart Bulk Upload Button Label

labels.value: Currently {0} items can be added to your cart, please checkout current cart and try again.
Your Cart is full, A maximum of 500 line items can be added to cart.
Unfortunately some line items could not be processed due to failures. Please reupload only the corrected failed lines and not the complete file.
Some Error Occured while adding items to cart
Uploaded file contains more rows than allowed.

• Only .csv files are allowed.
  • Duplicate part numbers will be ignored while processing.
  • You can upload up to 50 part numbers in a file.
Max 500 items can be added to your cart.

You cannot change Billing Address from here. Please contact system admin at support.shop@perkinelmer.com

labels.shortDescription: C.LBL Opp Territory LKUP No Matches
labels.value:
No territory match found between opportunity owner and assigned account.
Ensure that:
1. The correct account is assigned to the opportunity
2. The account’s assigned territories are up to date (edit/save on account)
3. The opportunity owner is assigned to a territory
Enter a value to change your quantity
How do you want to proceed?
Dx Software Services;Dx Software Services EMEA L2; Dx Support;Informatics

Enter a value between {min} and {max} in increments of {step}.

labels.value: Results are limited to 5,000 after the first page. Use sort options or filters to adjust your results.
Something Went wrong while creating Subscription
Could not Find Country During Checkout
This table currently has no data to display
This is a required entry. At least 1 row must be selected.

Use parentheses, AND, OR, and NOT to customize the logic. For example, if you enter “(1 AND 2 AND 3) OR 4”, the flow evaluates whether the first three conditions are true or only the fourth condition is true.
You provided an unsupported value for the DataTypeFilter input on Object and Field Picker. Currently the only supported value is ’picklist’
You don\'t have the proper permissions for ths action
"Manager APEX Class" can not be empty
There are multiple groups for that role
Sharing Settings must be private or public read/write to enable manual sharing
Only the record owner or administrators can modify permissions
Your search found more than 200 results. Keep typing to make it more specific
